title: User Namespaces — Limitations
text:
When using a user namespace for the pod, it is disallowed to use other host
namespaces. In particular, if you set
hostUsers: false
then you are not
allowed to set any of:
hostNetwork: true
hostIPC: true
hostPID: true
No container can use
volumeDevices
(raw block volumes, like /dev/sda) either.
This includes all the container arrays in the pod spec:
containers
initContainers
ephemeralContainers
